questions.question: Explain the basic components of a computer system.
Define an algorithm and explain its characteristics.
Draw a flowchart to find the sum of two numbers.
Explain keywords, identifiers, constants, and variables in C.
Explain different data types in C with examples.
Explain different operators in C programming.
Write a C program to perform addition of two numbers using basic input and output operations.
Explain expressions and precedence of operators in C.
Explain commonly used in-built functions in C.
Explain the concept of control structures in C programming.
Write a C program using if statement to check whether a number is positive or negative.
Write a C program using if-else to find the larger of two numbers.
Write a C program using nested if-else to find the largest of three numbers.
Write a C program using else-if ladder to determine grade based on marks.
Explain switch statement with an example program.
Write a C program to print numbers from 1 to 10 using a for loop.
Write a C program to calculate factorial using while loop.
Write a C program demonstrating do-while loop.
Explain the use of break and continue statements with examples.
Explain the concept of functions in C programming.
Explain function prototype, definition, and function call with example.
Write a C program to find the sum of two numbers using a user-defined function.
Write a C program to calculate factorial using recursion.
Explain the concept of arrays in C programming.
Write a C program to find the largest element in a one-dimensional array.
Write a C program to perform addition of two matrices using two-dimensional arrays.
Explain string declaration and initialization in C.
Write a C program to demonstrate string functions such as strlen and strcpy.
Explain the concept of structures and unions in C with examples.
Explain pointers, pointer declaration, initialization, dereferencing, and dynamic memory allocation in C.
